description: A Class D conduct artifact whose alternatives array is empty MUST receive CONDUCT_INVALID. At least one defensible alternative is required (D2).

input.claim: the recommended strategy is to ship F-1 as a class-scoped governance correction

not_optimizing_for: preservation of existing WISEATA wire format

reasoning_trace.claim: single-rule lock at genesis is upstream

challenge_surface.argument: thin Class A adoption is a real risk

not_optimizing_for: preservation of existing WISEATA wire format

why: WiseOrder Protocol v0.1.0 invariant D2: a conformant implementation MUST generate at least one defensible alternative. With alternatives=[] the artifact fails D2 → CONDUCT_INVALID. Mitigates the failure mode of threat D-1 (post-hoc rationalization without forced alternative consideration). Exercises D2.
